roles.title: Cloud Engineer
roles.description: Design, build, and maintain scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS/Azure/GCP. Collaborate with development teams to automate deployments and ensure reliability.

roles.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
roles.description: Monitor, detect, and respond to security threats. Conduct vulnerability assessments and implement security controls to protect systems and data.

roles.title: Backend Software Engineer
roles.description: Build and maintain scalable backend services and APIs. Work closely with frontend teams and data engineers to deliver reliable, high-performance systems.

roles.title: Data Engineer
roles.description: Design and maintain data pipelines, warehouses, and ETL processes to support analytics and ML workloads at scale.

roles.title: DevOps Engineer
roles.description: Bridge development and operations by automating deployments, managing infrastructure as code, and maintaining observability across distributed systems.

roles.title: Machine Learning Engineer
roles.description: Build, train, and deploy ML models in production. Collaborate with data scientists to bring models from research to scalable, reliable systems.
